response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong leadership and architectural skills, he falls significantly short of the core technical requirements for this specific role. He lacks the mandatory 8 years of C++ programming experience, having only brief professional exposure. Furthermore, his background is primarily in full-stack, web, and application-level distributed systems rather than the low-level cloud compute infrastructure, storage, and hardware architecture mandated by the job description.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience with a track record of launching large-scale distributed systems.
Demonstrated technical leadership through Staff-level roles, open-source project ownership, and active mentoring.
Deep expertise in software design, testing methodologies (TDD, CI/CD), and establishing engineering best practices.
concerns: Fails to meet the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming experience, with under a year of professional use.
Experience is heavily focused on full-stack and web development rather than low-level cloud compute platforms or hardware architecture.
Lacks the preferred Master's degree or PhD in computer science or a related technical field.
